briefdescription.para: prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
This function initializes the SI 5344 device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Xilinx Menu implementation as used in the HDMI example design.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xhdmi_menu.h for more details.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes - ----- -----------------------------------------------. 1.00 ND 18/10/22 Common DP 2.1 tx only application for zcu102 and vcu118 1.01 ND 26/02/24 Added support for 13.5 and 20G
